description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white plaster and wood-textured panels, creating a striking contrast. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The front yard includes a driveway, a small garden with palm trees, and a defined entryway with a covered porch. The rear and side yards are enclosed by walls, providing privacy and additional green space. The overall structure is spacious, with a blend of open and enclosed areas for both outdoor and indoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, white and wood-textured exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped front and side yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garden, and prominent wood-textured panels on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a large window facing the yard, with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with minimal windows and enclosed yard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance, side yard, and the rear garden area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, modern door, steps, and landscaped approach
